name: The Thumb East Soldato II Sinclair
description:
"If I fuck up this job I'll kill myself." - Sinclair

Tiny man gets indoctrinated into being a good little soldier. You're his boss, a Capo. Have fun with a pathetic man, or something.

Holy fuck that defeat wail was the first thing to make me physically recoil in this game.

why the fuck does this have 10k chats?
creator: 48CharacterLimit
